current_position.after_phase6_horizon_binding: Stage 6 is decomposed into subphases 6.1-6.7 so official-release work progresses from release boundary through packaging, docs, automation, archive/citation, clean-room reproducibility, and final ultra-hardening.
current_position.after_stage4_api_freeze: Stage 4 API contract is frozen for the first Stage 5 frontend scaffold.
current_position.after_stage5_browser_hardening: Stage 5 now has Playwright screenshot regression across desktop and mobile comparison panels, the public MLCI workflow, and an adversarial bounded-coupling case, with platform-specific Darwin/Linux baselines and CI wiring.
current_position.after_stage5_closeout: Stage 5 is completed as a contract-bound scientific workbench with upload parity, operation-specific visualizations, export provenance, browser regression, and adversarial layout guards.
current_position.after_stage5_final_ui_ux_polish: Stage 5.1 added a Simulation Workbench for the existing deterministic controller with parameter presets, trajectory visualization, first-passage timing, route readouts, exports, and browser regression coverage.
current_position.after_stage5_report_polish: Stage 5 now has professional operation-specific comparison panels for residence, bounded coupling, reserve, and reduced-model ranking, with report export ergonomics for JSON, CSV, Markdown, and backend bundles.
current_position.after_stage5_upload_parity: Stage 5 now has real CSV upload-flow hardening, visible parameter/schema inspection, and CLI/API/frontend parity audits for all six frozen contract operations.
current_position.after_stage5_ux_depth: Stage 5 now has richer trajectory inspection, explicit exported parameter provenance, and a guided MLCI public trajectory workflow that can be reproduced from CLI and the frozen upload route.
current_position.after_v0_3_x: Stage 3 case-study evidence bank is satisfied for the current v0.3 gate.
current_position.stage6_active_gate: Stage 6 release-hardening gates now pass through subphases 6.1-6.7. RhoDyn remains an active release candidate rather than a professionally citable public release until a version tag, GitHub archive, and Zenodo software record are intentionally cut or published.

non_drift_rules: RhoDyn is a general method for dynamic operating-state analysis in live-cell perturbation biology.
RhoDyn is not a reproduction pipeline for the RhoA/microglia manuscript.
The manuscript and Zenodo data remain an optional reference use case.
Stage 3 public examples teach what residence, buffering, bounded coupling, and routed outputs reveal beyond amplitude-only summaries.
Stage 4 backend work must delegate to stable Python library functions.
Stage 7 method evidence can expand the biological systems but should not reopen the Stage 3 closure unless a Stage 3 defect is found.
Stage 8 cannot reshape the Nature Methods evidence path.
Stage 5 frontend work must consume the frozen Stage 4 API contract.
purpose: Roadmap execution memory for the original Stage 3 to Stage 8 blueprint.

gate: At least two biological systems show a residence/amplitude distinction.
At least one case shows bounded coupling or reserve logic.
Examples do not imply RhoDyn generated the original manuscript results.
stage_lock.name: Case-study evidence bank
stage_lock.scope_rule: Keep the evidence bank stable. Additional public biological systems are Stage 7 evidence expansion unless they repair a documented Stage 3 defect.

gate: Every backend result matches the Python library output exactly.
No hidden state outside explicit durable job storage.
Jobs preserve input schema, parameter choices, software version, and bundle hashes.
Frozen OpenAPI, frontend contract, and fixtures are committed for Stage 5.
stage_lock.name: Backend
stage_lock.scope_rule: Treat the committed OpenAPI schema, frontend contract, fixtures, and closeout document as the Stage 5 dependency. Reopen Stage 4 only for documented contract defects.

stage_lock.current_gate: Closed on 2026-06-29 after frontend contract binding, upload parity, operation-specific comparison panels, simulation UX repair, export provenance, browser regression, and adversarial layout guards passed as a release-candidate workbench.
gate: A biologist can upload a tidy table and interpret amplitude-like versus residence-like behavior without reading code.
A quantitative user can inspect every parameter and reproduce the result from CLI.
The workbench consumes the frozen Stage 4 API contract rather than inventing new analysis routes.
stage_lock.latest_evidence: docs/stage5_closeout.md records the closeout. The Stage 5 audit suite covers frozen contract binding, upload-flow parity, simulation workbench parity, premium screenshot-regression readiness, and no-new-biology boundary.
stage_lock.name: Frontend
stage_lock.scope_rule: Build only frontend behavior that consumes the frozen Stage 4 contract and preserves parameter inspection plus CLI reproducibility.

stage_lock.current_gate: Release-hardening evidence passes across subphases 6.1-6.7. Do not call RhoDyn professionally citable until an intentional tag, GitHub archive, and Zenodo software record are cut or published.
gate: Wheel and source distribution install cleanly.
Documentation builds cleanly.
Examples and notebooks run from scratch.
Release automation covers tests, packaging, docs, Docker, and browser regression in CI.
GitHub and Zenodo archive/citation surfaces are ready with checksum manifests.
Release archive contains no private data, manuscript-private files, raw microscopy, local paths, or secrets.
stage_lock.name: Official software release
stage_lock.scope_rule: Hardening gates can pass before publication. Professional citability requires the release-candidate evidence plus an intentional tag/archive/DOI action.

subphases.gate: No manuscript-private data, hidden local paths, raw microscopy, or claim that RhoDyn generated the RhoA/microglia manuscript.
subphases.goal: Define the first official RhoDyn release as a Python library plus CLI and Stage 5 workbench surface.
subphases.name: Release boundary

subphases.gate: A fresh clone can install the package and run examples from scratch.
subphases.goal: Make installation professional with clean pyproject metadata, wheel, source distribution, optional extras, CLI entry points, and version stamping.
subphases.name: Packaging

subphases.gate: A biologist can run the basic workflow and a quantitative user can audit parameters.
subphases.goal: Provide quickstart, API reference, CLI reference, schema guide, interpretation guide, tutorials, example reports, and reproducibility card.
subphases.name: Documentation

subphases.gate: Every release surface builds from CI rather than from a local machine.
subphases.goal: Make releases repeatable through cross-version CI, package builds, docs builds, release checklist, changelog discipline, citation metadata, license and contribution docs, and Docker build.
subphases.name: Release automation

subphases.gate: The archive contains only intended software and public examples.
subphases.goal: Make RhoDyn independently citable through GitHub release, Zenodo DOI, CITATION.cff, release notes, archived source tarball, and checksum manifest.
subphases.name: Archive and citation

subphases.gate: No release path depends on the developer local machine.
subphases.goal: Test from zero with fresh clone, fresh virtual environment, installed wheel, CLI examples, notebooks, docs build, workbench run, and report export.
subphases.name: Clean-room reproducibility

subphases.gate: All official release surfaces pass together.
subphases.goal: Run local-path and secret scans, dependency review, broken-link docs scan, screenshot regression, CLI/API parity, Docker parity, PyPI dry run, Zenodo dry run, clean-room reproducibility, and frontend/backend output parity.
subphases.name: Final ultra-hardening

gate: Formal method definition and mathematical model are complete.
Benchmarks cover amplitude-only, endpoint-only, threshold-only, and generic time-series summaries.
At least two independent biological demonstrations beyond the original manuscript logic are in place.
Software implementation, uncertainty handling, tutorials, GUI or hosted demo, and limitations section are ready.
stage_lock.name: Nature Methods first
stage_lock.scope_rule: Treat this as a future scientific-methods campaign, not a rebranding of the RhoA/microglia manuscript or the Stage 3 examples.

gate: Open-core library, CLI, public adapters, examples, and basic reports remain useful without paid features.
Paid or hosted features add collaboration, private data, batch jobs, richer dashboards, export logs, adapters, and deployments without changing scientific claims.
Commercial positioning remains dynamic operating-state interpretation for live-cell perturbation data.
stage_lock.name: Product and commercial alignment
stage_lock.scope_rule: Product strategy inherits the Nature Methods framing and must not lead the scientific evidence path.
